improvement_notes: 조명: 스팟성 하이라이트와 림라이트 추가로 입체감 강화. 색감: 블랙 포인트를 내려 콘트라스트를 높이고, 음식 부분의 채도를 국소적으로 올려 식욕 자극. 구도: 젓가락이나 손 모델을 활용하여 역동성과 스토리 추가.
nano_banana_prompt: /imagine prompt: A high-quality food photograph of [FOOD NAME], rustic plating in a handmade ceramic bowl on a dark wooden table. Shot at a 45-degree angle, medium close-up. Lighting is soft, diffused side-backlight from a large window, creating gentle shadows and highlighting textures. The color palette is warm and cozy with muted tones. Shallow depth of field with the main food in sharp focus. The overall mood is natural, warm, and slightly rustic. Kodak Portra 400 film aesthetic, matte look with lifted blacks, fine film grain. --ar 2:3 --style raw --stylize 250
